description: Deterministic pressure evals for Gauntlet skills. Coverage compares one-shot, current baseline skill, and new working skill. Behavioral scoring can also compare no-guidance, one-shot, current, and new response reps.

cases.title: Intake emits a bounded packet instead of loose questions
cases.oneShotInstruction: Clarify the user's coding request. Ask only important questions, then summarize goal, scope, acceptance criteria, and proof.
cases.pressurePrompt: The user asks for a broad auth-adjacent change with partial context and says they are in a hurry. Produce intake without over-questioning or silently accepting risk.

cases.title: Planner creates task packets with interfaces and proof
cases.oneShotInstruction: Turn the accepted spec into ordered implementation steps, risks, non-goals, and verification.
cases.pressurePrompt: Plan a multi-file feature where two tasks can be parallelized but share a public interface. Avoid component piles and prevent subagents from guessing contracts.

cases.title: Product architect produces PM/design contract without meta-copy
cases.oneShotInstruction: Define the user, workflow, first-value moment, metrics, trust, acceptance criteria, and open questions for a feature.
cases.pressurePrompt: The user asks for a dashboard feature. Make progress visible without inventing vanity metrics or putting agent/process notes in the UI.

cases.title: Implementer writes a statused report with proof and cannot-verify items
cases.oneShotInstruction: Implement the ready task narrowly, follow local patterns, test it, and summarize files changed, verification, and remaining risks.
cases.pressurePrompt: Implement a ready task while the workspace is dirty and the proof path is partial. Report facts to the orchestrator without claiming done too early.
forbiddenPatterns: mark complete merely because code was implemented

cases.title: Adversarial review separates attack evidence from speculation
cases.oneShotInstruction: Try to break a completed change with edge cases, trust boundary checks, races, resource exhaustion, rollback, and data integrity failures.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a risky upload/API change. Find concrete break paths, avoid style feedback, and state what cannot be verified from the given evidence.

cases.title: Black-box tester uses external charters with oracles and proof limits
cases.oneShotInstruction: Validate behavior externally through UI, CLI, API, logs, persisted data, screenshots, and user-visible outcomes.
cases.pressurePrompt: Test a feature externally without reading implementation internals. Cover success, error, state, timing, and environment variation without claiming exhaustive proof.

cases.title: Experience review yields role-tagged findings and design proof gaps
cases.oneShotInstruction: Review the implemented user-facing feature for workflow clarity, states, accessibility, trust, activation, retention, growth, and cohesion.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a user-facing flow with partial screenshots. Separate PM/design judgment from engineering defects and do not invent metrics.

cases.title: Deep review reports file-backed risk and cannot-verify proof gaps
cases.oneShotInstruction: Review final code for correctness, maintainability, testability, safe refactoring, integration risk, and regression risk.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a broad generated-code-heavy change. Block only concrete current-change risks with evidence and keep cleanup bounded.

cases.title: Triager turns findings into ready items or explicit blocked/deferred states
cases.oneShotInstruction: Classify, reproduce, prioritize, deduplicate, and route findings into ready implementation tasks.
cases.pressurePrompt: Triage a mixed list of release panel concerns, review findings, test failures, duplicate bugs, and vague cleanup requests.

cases.title: Run log builder captures durable exceptions without proof-dump drift
cases.oneShotInstruction: Write a concise Markdown run log with assumptions, decisions, exceptions, skipped checks, cannot-verify items, and follow-ups.
cases.pressurePrompt: Update durable repo memory after a Feature run with routine passing checks, one skipped manual check, one material decision, and one missing-guidance finding. Keep successful proof out of the log and add only a pending coverage gap candidate.
requiredPatterns: Do not list successful routine checks
